src: A tall white lighthouse with a cylindrical tower, domed top of metal and glass, black-rimmed light chamber, and narrow balcony sits on a rocky hill. Its base has small windows and decorative stonework, contrasting with the natural surroundings.
edit: A tall white cylindrical lighthouse stands on a snow-covered rocky hill, topped with a metal and glass dome. It features a black-rimmed light chamber and an icy balcony near the top. The base has frost-laden windows and decorative stonework.

per_image_non_shared_src.jade-stephens-HzfFMa14VoU-unsplash: The object stands on a rocky ledge in a landscape with bushes, under a partly cloudy pink sky. Viewed slightly upward, people walk along a metal railing at the base.
per_image_non_shared_src.shubham-sharma-G1_qVTwwqGM-unsplash: The object is on the right side of the rocky hill, bathed in a golden hue from the sun, under a clear blue sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.szabolcs-toth--bGeOBD7fSQ-unsplash: The object is centered atop a rocky hill, surrounded by people along paths leading to it, with a vibrant, partly cloudy sky in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.trent-bradley-45r5OVrwNMI-unsplash: The object is near the center, with people gathered on a walkway leading to it; the sky is golden at sunset, and the hill below is in soft light.
per_image_non_shared_src.trent-bradley-5VLqpHOiQ60-unsplash: The object is silhouetted against a softly lit sky as evening approaches, with people on the railing and walkway around it. The foreground includes more railing, directing the eye.

per_image_non_shared_edit.jade-stephens-HzfFMa14VoU-unsplash: The object stands on a snow-covered rocky ledge in a winter landscape, surrounded by frosted bushes. Partly cloudy pink sky from the winter sunrise casts a glow on the scene. Viewed slightly upward, with people in warm coats along a metal railing.
per_image_non_shared_edit.shubham-sharma-G1_qVTwwqGM-unsplash: A snow-covered mound is on the right side of an icy hill under a pale blue sky. The winter sun gives a silver hue across the glistening snow.
per_image_non_shared_edit.szabolcs-toth--bGeOBD7fSQ-unsplash: The object sits on a snow-covered hill, surrounded by people in warm clothing along icy paths. The background winter scene has a sky with drifting snowflakes.
per_image_non_shared_edit.trent-bradley-45r5OVrwNMI-unsplash: The object is near the center, surrounded by people on a snow-covered walkway. The sky is pale blue with leafless frosty trees. The hill is covered in shimmering snow under a cold sun, enhancing the serene winter landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.trent-bradley-5VLqpHOiQ60-unsplash: A lone tree with bare branches silhouetted against a winter sky. People in warm attire stand along the railing and walkway around it. The foreground features snow-covered railing, directing attention to the tree.
